text:
Prediction: No

Reasoning: The current visit record primarily details diagnoses and procedures related to severe cardiovascular disease (Coronary atherosclerosis, Atrial fibrillation, Hypertension, Cerebrovascular disease, Aorto-coronary bypass). There is no explicit mention of a lipid disorder (such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia) in the current diagnoses or management plan. Therefore, based strictly on the provided evidence, there is no strong and explicit basis to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
